title: <div>Rok is lured into the bathroom, where Gre is tied up in the shower. Rok joi
content:
Rok is lured into the bathroom, where Gre is tied up in the shower. Rok joins him and is locked in. The water fills.
They make their decision at the same time, but only Sus’ os broadcasted and targeted to SJW. Her dance instructor’s life is offered for her brother’s life.
Rok dies a slow death.
The dance instructor is killed.
Li is revealed to have sacrificed her family to the extremists to Fre.
A mutiny occurs, on both fronts at the same time. We flash cut between narratives.
Fre is forced more meds. Lead to the car. Is drowned in the river by crashing the driverless car.
Sus is followed around and terrorized by protestors. She is eventually killed by protestors. Her face held down in a puddle.
Li becomes the new head of the terrorist organization.
Her popularity forces the organization to leave her and kill her.
Fre is contacted and told he is his families only hope. Princess Leia.

Dream Sequences
Stork
Santa Claus


Leave Lef alive when he falls out of the tank. Someone then needs to put him out of his misery.
